articles.title: What Is a Large Language Model (LLM)? A Plain-English Guide

articles.oneLiner: Understand what a large language model actually is and why a giant text predictor can write code, answer questions, and hold a conversation.

articles.title: How Do LLMs Actually Work? Next-Token Prediction Explained
articles.seoTitle: How Do LLMs Work? Next-Token Prediction Explained
articles.metaDescription: LLMs don't think — they predict the next token, billions of times. See how next-token prediction turns probability into fluent, useful text.
keywords: how does an llm generate text
how do language models predict the next word
articles.oneLiner: See the single mechanism — predicting the next token — that powers every answer an LLM has ever given you.

keywords: gpu vs cpu for ai explained
why is ai compute so expensive
what hardware do llms run on
articles.oneLiner: Understand why a model is really billions of multiplications, and why GPUs — and their scarce VRAM — set the price of AI.

articles.title: What Are AI Scaling Laws? Why Bigger Models Got Smarter

why are llms bad at spelling

why does ai write wrong code
